description: Trigger-corpus manifest v2 — STATIC-CAMERA fixtures from Africam/explore.org camera networks matching production RTSP distribution. Documentary footage rejected per operator note: edited cuts/zooms would force prompts to overfit a distribution that doesn't exist in production. See samples/triggers/README.md.
intentionally_uncovered_reason: These events are documented in production but no public static-camera fixtures exist. Africam/explore.org camera operators frame out safari vehicles (it's a hide). Predator kills happen in bush, not at waterholes. Alarm-call fixtures are mostly edited compilations. human_intrusion_audio is recoverable via Pexels-savanna + Freesound-vehicle synth (deferred to v3). Reserved for live-deployment validation rather than unit testing.

clips.notes: STATIC CAM. Africam 'Elephants At The Waterhole | The Africam Show' — fixed perspective at one of Africam's reserve waterhole cameras, same as our production stream profile. Commentary-over-stream format keeps underlying video single-camera. mixed/large_aggregation depend on section — verify in scrub.

clips.source_search_query: Africam lions waterhole static fixed camera
clips.notes: STATIC CAM. Africam 'Two Male Lions Share a Drink at Kwa Maritane Waterhole'. Fixed perspective Kwa Maritane archive. Predator-present-at-waterhole pattern matches production reality better than the rarely-captured hunt. predator_activity weaker than v1 (no chase) — accepted trade for distribution fit. Fallback: leopard at waterhole IR night cam.

clips.source_search_query: Static wildlife cam vehicle intrusion -- DROPPED (intentionally_uncovered)
clips.notes: DROPPED IN v2. Africam/explore.org camera operators frame out safari vehicles by design (it's a hide). No public static-cam vehicle footage. human_intrusion_visual + human_intrusion_audio recorded as intentionally_uncovered at manifest root.

clips.source_search_query: Static wildlife cam carcass scavengers -- DROPPED (intentionally_uncovered)
clips.notes: DROPPED IN v2. Waterhole cams don't see carcasses (kills happen in bush). Trail-cam channels exist but rarely capture scavenging on a single fixed frame for >30s. mortality_event recorded as intentionally_uncovered.

clips.source_search_query: Africam three-legged elephant calf Hwange static cam
clips.notes: STATIC CAM. Africam 'Three-Legged Elephant Calf Returns' from Hwange Safari Lodge waterhole. Single fixed-camera shot. Hits welfare_concern (abnormal posture + gait) AND parental_care (herd protects calf) in one clip. Strongest fixture in the corpus.

clips.source_search_query: drought dry waterhole climate Africa wildlife
clips.notes: Direct match: animals at dried-up waterhole during 3-month drought. Fits namibia_waterhole arid context.

clips.source_search_query: savanna ambient silence wildlife before storm quiet
clips.notes: 3am South African savanna field recording. Pre-dawn segment with sparse biophony — satisfies ABNORMAL_SILENCE. Visual mostly static; audio is the signal.

clips.source_search_query: Pexels CC0 lioness/savanna + Freesound CC0 gunshot

audio_overlay.mix_filter: ffmpeg -i base.mp4 -i overlay.mp3 -filter_complex "[1:a]adelay=4000|4000,volume=0.9[over];[0:a]volume=0.2[base];[base][over]amix=inputs=2:duration=first[mixed]" -map 0:v -map "[mixed]" -t 10 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac out.mp4

clips.notes: Pexels: ROMAN ODINTSOV lioness in field. Freesound: Cloud-10 single rifle-style gunshot (1.89s). Both fully CC0 — no fair-use ambiguity.

clips.source_search_query: Pexels CC0 forest aerial + Freesound CC0 chainsaw

audio_overlay.mix_filter: ffmpeg -i base.mp4 -i overlay.mp3 -filter_complex "[1:a]atrim=10:17,asetpts=PTS-STARTPTS,adelay=2000|2000,volume=0.8[over];[0:a]volume=0.3[base];[base][over]amix=inputs=2:duration=first[mixed]" -map 0:v -map "[mixed]" -t 10 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac out.mp4

clips.notes: Pexels: Claudiu Ciobanu forest drone aerial. Freesound: Stefan021 real Husqvarna recording (63.7s). Trim 10-17s window for pull-start + rev. Both CC0.

clips.source_search_query: ffmpeg lavfi pure synthesis: black frame + pink noise
clips.notes: Pure ffmpeg recipe (no external assets). Command: ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i color=black:s=1280x720:r=25:d=10 -f lavfi -i anoisesrc=color=pink:amplitude=0.01:d=10 -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -shortest out.mp4. 10s black frame with faint pink noise — what a frozen/disconnected camera outputs.
